ValidationRule.description: Opportunities at 10% where type="New Sale", cannot have cycle price value that isn't $0. ***Deactivated so we can create a new business process***
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Type,'New Sale'), Probability = 0.1, Cycle_Price__c <> 0, NOT(ISCHANGED( BI_Data__c )), NOT(ISCHANGED(Have_SE__c)), NOT(ISCHANGED(Account_owner_changed__c)), $Profile.Name <>'SW SalesOps Extended', $Profile.Name <>'SW SalesOps', $Profile.Name <>'System Administrator', RecordTypeId <> '012b0000000cfCa' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Opp at 10% cannot have a cycle price value. Please move the opp to 25% or above to adjust the opp amount.
